predictions.match: Everton FC v West Ham United FC

result.analysis: Everton are at home and have played one more game, sitting on 7 points compared to West Ham's 3. Everton have also conceded less goals. Considering these factors, Everton are slightly favoured to win.

overUnder.analysis: Everton have only scored 6 and conceded 5 in 5 games. West Ham have scored 5 and conceded 13 in 5 games. Both team's scoring records suggest a low scoring game is more probable.

bothTeamsToScore.analysis: West Ham's poor attacking form and Everton's better defensive record suggest that both teams are unlikely to score.
